backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no methods.
feature_evidence.json: Metadata file listing implemented features, associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of key frontend files including App.tsx, index.css, and usePersistedNumber hook.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base theme defining OKLCH color variables and dark mode mappings, applying global border and background/foreground styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: React app with a click counter, localStorage persistence, and a 1000-click explosion animation that redirects afterward.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Internet Identity context and provider handling AuthClient setup, login flow, stored identity loading, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/usePersistedNumber.ts: Hook that stores a numeric state value in localStorage with validation and automatic syncing.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind config with OKLCH theme variables, custom red button utilities, and explosion animation keyframes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry initializing React Query, Internet Identity provider, and rendering the App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration enabling dark mode, custom OKLCH color tokens, extended animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: JSON snapshot describing the project's schema version and detailed feature summaries for the React/Tailwind frontend and empty Motoko backend.
